metadata.title: Governance DRep Discovery Plan Tasks
metadata.description: Standalone DRep Discovery implementation plan for browse, evaluate, favorite, select, and delegate in Daedalus. Query-path discovery gate findings are captured in the markdown plan.

phases.name: Sprint 1 - Shared Types, Socket Path, Query Service, and IPC
phases.description: Lay the data plumbing for DRep Discovery from main process to renderer.

tasks.title: Define shared DRep Discovery TypeScript types
tasks.description: Add shared types in source/common/ for DRep registration state, active/inactive status, expiry epoch and greater-than-six-epoch eligibility, voting power, anchor presence, metadata-completeness state, current epoch vote positions on active proposals, wallet governance delegation status, source labels, refresh metadata, and query failure payloads.
acceptanceCriteria: Use `votingPower: BigNumber | null`; expose optional detail-only delegated stake with the same lossless value if labeled separately.
Document IPC serialization for lovelace fields as decimal strings with renderer-side BigNumber rehydration.
Define typed `QueryFailure`, ranking-unavailable failure, refresh metadata, `InvalidDrepId`, and `SelfnodeCliUnsupported` variants.

tasks.title: Own cardano-node socket path across launcher lifecycle
tasks.description: Implement the DRep Discovery prerequisite for cardano-cli queries: set `nodeConfig.socketFile` explicitly in CardanoWalletLauncher before constructing cardanoLauncher.Launcher, then capture `node.nodeService.socketPath` after `node.start()` resolves in CardanoNode and expose it through a read-only accessor. Do not add a `nodeSocketPath` field to `WalletOptions` or `CardanoNodeConfig`.
acceptanceCriteria: `nodeConfig.socketFile` is set pre-launch in the cardano-node branch of CardanoWalletLauncher.
`CardanoNode` exposes the launcher-resolved socket path via an instance accessor populated after `node.start()`.
No new field is added to `WalletOptions` or `CardanoNodeConfig`.
Selfnode coverage exercises a cardano-cli query through the threaded socket path, or returns typed `SelfnodeCliUnsupported` at service init.
CLI subprocesses receive the socket via `CARDANO_NODE_SOCKET_PATH` in spawn env, not via `--socket-path` argv.

tasks.title: Add main-process DRep query service
tasks.description: Implement a singleton GovernanceQueryService in source/main/ for DRep list, DRep detail, current epoch vote positions, and wallet governance status using the confirmed cardano-cli path and shared DRep Discovery types.
acceptanceCriteria: Representative `drep-state`, `drep-stake-distribution`, and `gov-state` fixtures from a synced node are committed under tests/mocks/governance/ before this service merges, including at least one lovelace value above Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER.
Requests latest local state on load and on user refresh, deduplicating in-flight requests and retaining last-successful data only for stale-while-refresh continuity.
Bulk `--all-dreps` is invoked once per latest-state refresh; per-DRep CLI invocations are forbidden.
Reads the captured node socket path from CardanoNode and passes it through `CARDANO_NODE_SOCKET_PATH` in spawn env.
Parses CLI stdout with json-bigint in lossless mode and constructs BigNumber values from raw decimal strings; native JSON.parse -> Number -> BigNumber is forbidden.
Includes a fixture/test with lovelace greater than 9_007_199_254_740_991 that round-trips parse -> IPC decimal string -> BigNumber rehydration losslessly.
Validates any future per-id DRep argv before spawn: bech32 prefix in {drep, drep_script} with valid checksum and CIP-129 length, or 56-char lowercase hex.
Rejected IDs return typed `InvalidDrepId` and never reach spawn.

`drep-state` whole-call failure returns typed directory `QueryFailure`; `drep-stake-distribution` whole-call failure returns typed ranking-unavailable `QueryFailure`; `gov-state` whole-call failure sets `currentEpochVotePositions: null` per DRep.
Era flag uses `latest`, with `conway` fallback only if the query findings report that the alias is missing.

tasks.title: Add governance IPC channels for DRep Discovery
tasks.description: Add typed IPC channel contracts in source/common/ipc/api.ts for DRep list, DRep detail, wallet governance status, and refresh metadata. Register main-process handlers in source/main/ipc/index.ts wired to GovernanceQueryService.

tasks.title: Add renderer IPC clients for DRep Discovery
tasks.description: Add renderer-side IPC client wrappers in source/renderer/app/ipc/ for DRep Discovery channels, following the same main/renderer split pattern as Mithril IPC clients.

tasks.title: Maintain cardano-wallet API surface checklist
tasks.description: For future cardano-wallet bumps, run the DRep API surface checklist before merge. If any DRep route beyond wallet-scoped joinDRep appears, stop and re-open the query-path decision before continuing DRep Discovery work.
acceptanceCriteria: Record the new cardano-wallet tag or revision and NAR hash from flake.lock in the PR description.
Attach a fresh swagger grep artifact saved under tests/mocks/governance/.
If directory-wide DRep endpoints appear, re-open the query-path decision before continuing.
Review upstream cardano-wallet commits, release notes, and security advisories between previous rev and new rev.
Prefer tagged cardano-wallet releases unless a branch pin is explicitly approved.

phases.name: Sprint 2 - GovernanceStore, Directory, Detail, and Selector
phases.description: Users can browse, evaluate, favorite, and select a DRep inside Daedalus using local on-chain data only.

tasks.title: Add GovernanceStore for DRep Discovery
tasks.description: Create source/renderer/app/stores/GovernanceStore.ts and register it in stores/index.ts. The store owns DRep list, browsing detail, favorites, selectedDRepId, default cohort state, search/show-all state, loading states, refresh state, and typed error states. VotingStore must not read GovernanceStore state directly.

tasks.title: Build DRep directory component
tasks.description: Build a DRep directory list component with default-view scaffold and final verified-metadata cohort rule. Default view excludes the top 35 DReps by voting power and shows up to the next 200 DReps that are active, have expiry more than 6 epochs away, and have completed metadata. Eligible DReps are ranked by voting power high to low and displayed in randomized order. Sprint 2 shows local on-chain fields and anchor presence only until verified metadata completeness lands.
acceptanceCriteria: Excluded top-35 and non-cohort DReps remain reachable through search/show-all filters and direct DRep ID entry.
Columns include DRep ID, active/inactive status, expiry status, voting power, metadata status, and favorite toggle.
Filters include active status, expiry threshold, metadata status, top-35 exclusion, default cohort, favorited, search, and show-all.
Refresh button reloads latest local state and updates ranking/cohort state.

tasks.title: Build DRep detail view component
tasks.description: Build a DRep detail view showing local on-chain fields only in Sprint 2: ID, registration state, active/inactive state, expiry, voting power or delegated stake, current epoch vote positions on active proposals, and anchor presence. Include graceful absence states, latest-state refresh, and favorite toggle.
acceptanceCriteria: Anchor metadata is not rendered in Sprint 2; verified anchor rendering lands after anchor fetch and hash-verification hardening.
Detail view remains useful when current epoch vote positions are unavailable.

tasks.title: Integrate DRep selector into VotingPowerDelegation
tasks.description: Add a Browse DReps affordance in VotingPowerDelegation.tsx that opens the in-app DRep directory. Selecting a DRep pre-fills selectedDRepId in the delegation form via component prop or route param only. Retain direct DRep ID paste input. Submission must continue through existing software-wallet delegateVotes and hardware-wallet VotingStore paths.
acceptanceCriteria: No second delegation backend is introduced.
VotingStore does not read GovernanceStore directly.

tasks.title: Update delegation confirmation with DRep identity
tasks.description: Update the DRep delegation confirmation dialog to always display the DRep ID in Sprint 2. Do not show verified display names until anchor metadata has been verified, hardened, and source-labeled.

tasks.title: Persist DRep favorites via Electron local store
tasks.description: Wire GovernanceStore favorites as a Set<string> of DRep IDs to Electron local store for per-device persistence across sessions. Favorites are not per-wallet and not synced.

tasks.title: Wire routes for DRep directory and DRep detail
tasks.description: Add route definitions in source/renderer/app/Routes.tsx for DRep directory and DRep detail if they are implemented as separate routed pages. Update navigation to include DRep Discovery entry points.

phases.name: Sprint 3 - Local End-to-End Integration
phases.description: Prove the local DRep Discovery flow end to end before anchor rendering begins. Not a release checkpoint.

tasks.title: Verify local browse, select, and delegate flow
tasks.description: Verify end to end that a user can open the DRep directory, view local on-chain DRep data, view DRep detail with current epoch vote positions, mark a DRep as favorite, select a DRep, see it pre-filled in the delegation form, view the confirmation dialog with DRep ID only, and submit through existing delegateVotes/VotingStore paths. No anchor-derived profile content is required at this stage.
acceptanceCriteria: No anchor-derived content is rendered before anchor fetch, verification, parsing, and source labeling land.

tasks.title: Run internal smoke and integration pass
tasks.description: Run yarn compile, yarn lint, and a manual smoke test of the local DRep Discovery flow to confirm the local milestone is stable before anchor work begins.

phases.name: Sprint 4 - Anchor Enrichment, Source Labeling, and Release Gate
phases.description: Add verified DRep profile enrichment and harden all DRep Discovery surfaces for release.

tasks.title: Add hardened anchor fetch service
tasks.description: Implement an anchor fetch service in source/main/ with a transport-agnostic interface. HTTP/HTTPS transport is implemented; IPFS interface slot is reserved but not implemented. The service returns only bounded, unparsed raw bytes with size, timeout, SSRF, redirect, content-type, and TLS guards applied. It does not parse JSON or write cache entries.
acceptanceCriteria: TLS default verification remains on; no `rejectUnauthorized: false`.
Redirects are disabled by default; 3xx surfaces as the same graceful empty state as 404.
Per-request connect+total timeout is <= 10 seconds.
Hard response-size cap is about 1 MB; abort on overflow.
Content-type allow-list includes application/json and application/ld+json; reject otherwise.
SSRF guard rejects RFC 1918, loopback, link-local, 0.0.0.0/8, ULA, and IPv6 reserved ranges.
DNS-rebinding mitigation binds the validated resolved IP to the actual TCP connection through either IP-literal connect with original Host/servername or a custom cached lookup option.
Fetch result is bounded raw bytes plus transport metadata only; no JSON parsing and no cache writes occur in this task.

tasks.title: Hash-verify, cache, and parse DRep anchor bytes
tasks.description: Verify fetched raw anchor bytes against the on-chain anchor hash before parsing, caching, use, or rendering. Store verified bytes/content in an immutable local cache keyed by anchor hash. Cache hit skips fetch and remains bound to the current on-chain hash; stale cached content for a new on-chain hash is not served. Parse DRep anchor JSON only after Blake2b-256 hash verification succeeds.
acceptanceCriteria: Blake2b-256 hash verification runs on bounded raw bytes before JSON parsing.
Only hash-verified bytes/content are written to immutable cache keyed by anchor hash.
Parse failures surface as graceful anchor-unavailable states without rendering partial content.
Stale cached content for a changed on-chain anchor hash is not served.

tasks.title: Render verified DRep anchor metadata
tasks.description: Wire verified DRep anchor metadata into DRep detail and delegation confirmation: display name, objectives, motivations, qualifications, and references from CIP-119. Expose verified metadata-completeness state to GovernanceStore so the final default cohort can exclude top-35 DReps by voting power and show up to the next 200 eligible DReps in randomized order.
acceptanceCriteria: All anchor-derived fields carry a verified off-chain content source label.
Chain-native view remains fully functional when anchor is unavailable or fails verification.
Delegation confirmation shows verified display name only when verified metadata is available.

tasks.title: Apply source labeling to DRep Discovery content
tasks.description: Ensure consistent visual distinction between local on-chain state and verified off-chain anchor-derived content across DRep Discovery surfaces. No anchor-derived content is shown without the verified off-chain content label.
acceptanceCriteria: Apply the source label to verified display names in DRep detail and delegation confirmation.
Local on-chain view remains complete and useful without anchor data.

tasks.title: Localize DRep Discovery copy
tasks.description: Write and polish all DRep Discovery user-visible text in en-US.json and ja-JP.json: directory headings and labels, default cohort filters, refresh states, detail field labels, selector copy, source labels, empty/error states, confirmation dialog DRep ID and verified-name display, and walkthrough updates for the in-app browse -> evaluate -> select -> delegate flow.
acceptanceCriteria: Product-quality copy exists in both en-US and ja-JP; i18n:manage passing is necessary but not sufficient.
Update .vscode/docs/walkthroughs/governance/ to remove GovTool-routing language for this flow.

tasks.title: Add Storybook coverage for DRep Discovery
tasks.description: Add Storybook stories for DRep directory loaded, empty, error, refreshing, default cohort, and search/show-all states; DRep detail local-only, with verified anchor, anchor unavailable, and anchor hash mismatch states; selector within delegation form; favorite toggle; source labels; confirmation dialog with DRep ID only and with verified DRep name; and all loading/error states.

tasks.title: Add Jest coverage for DRep Discovery
tasks.description: Add Jest specs for shared DRep types and parsing, query service behavior, latest-on-load and refresh behavior, default cohort ranking/randomization, anchor fetch and verification, hash mismatch, timeout, size limit, GovernanceStore actions and computed values, selector integration, confirmation identity display, and hardware-wallet propagation.
acceptanceCriteria: Hardware-wallet tests cover selected DRep ID propagation from selector -> confirmation -> signing payload.
Hardware-wallet tests cover on-device confirmation identity display, DRep ID plus verified name when available, device-disconnected, device-locked, and signing-rejected states.
Assert no software-signing fallback is invoked when a hardware wallet is selected.

tasks.title: Add Cucumber coverage and release verification
tasks.description: Add Cucumber scenarios for DRep Discovery: browse directory, refresh latest governance data, use search/show-all for excluded or non-cohort DReps, view detail with local on-chain data, view verified anchor profile, favorite a DRep, select a DRep from the directory, and complete delegation to that DRep. Confirm users can complete browse -> evaluate -> select -> delegate without external portals on a synced mainnet node.
acceptanceCriteria: Cucumber scenario coverage includes hardware-wallet browse -> select -> confirm-on-device -> delegate path with mocked Ledger and Trezor transports.
Release verification confirms the DRep Discovery gate: users can complete browse -> evaluate -> select -> delegate without external portals.
